title: Story Pack: starter lifecycle trace demo

prioritization.priority_rationale: The starter story pack is the first delivery artifact that proves the seeded PRD can turn into bounded implementation-ready work.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: QA and engineering should confirm the starter stories stay within the seeded release-readiness boundary.

delivery_burden_summary: The starter slice is intentionally narrow, but it still needs visible context refs and testability notes so adopters can understand the handoff shape.
ambiguity_notes: The seeded trace should remain canonical and not branch into multiple parallel examples.
Later launch and outcome work should stay visible as deferred, not implied as complete.

stories.title: Carry the starter trace through delivery and release readiness
stories.narrative: As a new ProductOS adopter, I want the starter workspace to show one canonical item through release readiness so I can understand the intended lifecycle shape before replacing the demo data.
testability_notes: The seeded story should point clearly back to the PRD and lifecycle snapshots.
The starter should preserve explicit deferred later stages rather than hiding them.

implementation_context_refs.title: Starter Release-Readiness Review
implementation_context_refs.summary: A simple walkthrough of how the seeded starter trace reaches bounded release readiness.
